title: TUESDAY OBSERVATION
subtitle: The Mixing Glass · 11:00 PM
epigraph_upright: Mixing, moderation, the ratios that land — fire and water held at exactly the right temperature.
epigraph_reversed: The off pour, the ratio that's wrong by a splash, the night that tilts.
scene_description: Tuesday at the Mixing Glass. Frank takes a stool at the end of the bar like he's always there. The neon spells OPEN.
direction_hint: The measure has to be exact. Within a quarter ounce or the drink is wrong.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at The Mixing Glass · 11:00 PM.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
